meta.title: NEW AI Video Generator DESTROYS VEO 3 & Kling AI - Seedance 1.0
meta.description:
Seedance 1.0 a NEW AI Video Generator  just got released but is it better than VEO 3 & Kling AI?
I Generated VEO 3 & Kling 2.1 videos using OpenArt
Try out Seedance here 👉https://openart.ai/home?ref=seedance

Seedance 1.0 just launched. In this video I take a look at their demo videos and compare it to VEO 3 and Kling 2.1 Pro. I'm honestly really impressed by Seedance and later this week I will dive in with using my own prompts.

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
